title: forge-collab state.json
description: Authoritative shape of the single state document on forge/collab-state. T019 (spec-collab-fix R003) formalizes this so readers and writers can validate on read + write. Unknown keys are tolerated for forward compatibility; validators log a warning rather than reject.

leases.description: Map from lease name to a lease record. Keys are opaque strings (task ids, consolidation markers, etc.).

claimant.description: Client id (handle) currently holding the lease.

acquiredAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the lease was taken.

messages.description: Bounded append queue of transport messages. Writers compact stale entries (ts older than ttl_seconds) and cap the array at 500; readers dedupe by id per-process.

id.description: Unique message id. Used by readers for per-process dedup.

data.description: Event payload. `data.target` (when present) is the targeted subscriber handle.

ttl_seconds.description: Optional per-message TTL override. Absent -> transport default (300 s).
